title: My Puppet Band
description: Build a band of puppet friends, give them real instruments, and stage a rainbow concert with songs, grooves, and tap-for-a-solo moments.
learningGoals: Hear how real instruments sound alone and together
Explore melody, bass, chords, and rhythm through play
Make musical choices — every band combination sounds good
interactionModel: puppet-band: tap friends into a band (2-5), tap instrument badges to cycle real-sampled instruments with preview notes, then a live concert where tapping any puppet triggers a beat-quantized solo
feedbackModel: Pure sandbox — every tap makes music. Preview notes and sparkles on every choice; grooving puppets accent their own notes; no fail states.
credits: Second game on the shared bone-rig puppet stack; first on the shared instrument-sample library (user-supplied samples) and the music.js WebAudio band engine. Built with Claude for QLOBE Kids.
